summary: AI-Assisted Reference Resolution Engine feature fully tested. All 13 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI components render correctly with match outcome, best match, alternate matches, extracted references, and resolver debug panel all functional.

issues: Console warning about input value '1,000.00' cannot be parsed - likely Total Amount field number formatting issue (minor, non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: ReferenceIntelligenceService properly extracts candidates from extracted_fields and document text
BCReferenceResolver correctly connects to Production BC using real credentials
Events reference.extraction.completed and reference.resolve.ambiguous/completed are properly emitted
BCWriteSafetyGuard correctly blocks production writes with BC_WRITE_ENABLED=false
Frontend ReferenceIntelligencePanel renders all sections: match outcome, best match, alternates, candidates, debug panel
Resolve button triggers POST /api/documents/{id}/resolve-intelligence and updates UI
Workflow Events timeline shows reference events with proper formatting
seed_data_creation: Used existing test document a1dec76a-17a2-46d4-a9f9-a0f6fb818208 with PO 110463
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reference Intelligence feature fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/documents/{id}/resolve-intelligence (runs full resolution), GET /api/documents/{id}/reference-intelligence (gets stored data), POST /api/bc/resolve-reference?reference_number=X (basic BC lookup), GET /api/bc/write-guard/status (shows production writes blocked). Frontend panel at /documents/{id} shows Reference Intelligence card with match outcome, best match, alternates, extracted references, and collapsible debug panel. Test document a1dec76a-17a2-46d4-a9f9-a0f6fb818208 has full intelligence data.

backend_resolve_intelligence_endpoint.evidence: POST /api/documents/{id}/resolve-intelligence returns candidates, match_outcome, best_match, alternate_matches, resolver_strategy, processing_time_ms

backend_get_reference_intelligence.evidence: GET /api/documents/{id}/reference-intelligence returns stored intelligence data after resolution

event_reference_extraction_completed.evidence: reference.extraction.completed event emitted with candidate_count and candidates array

event_reference_resolve_ambiguous.evidence: reference.resolve.ambiguous event emitted with match_outcome, best_match_type, best_match_score, bc_queries, processing_time_ms

frontend_best_match_section.evidence: Shows BC Doc No: 110463, Entity Type: posted sales shipment, Customer: David Evans Foods

frontend_resolver_debug_panel.evidence: Collapsible panel shows Document Type, Strategy, BC Queries: 12, Processing Time, Search Order

frontend_resolve_button.evidence: Re-resolve button triggers resolution and updates UI

mocked_apis.note: All BC API calls are REAL against Production BC (BC_PROD_ENVIRONMENT=Production). No mocked APIs.
